identity.canonical_title: Scale Invariance of Recursive Toroidal Encoding

theory.canonical_statement: There is no privileged scale in the recursive toroidal encoding; refining or coarsening the sampling density corresponds to different depth encodings of the same torus, not to a change in geometry.
theory.technical_interpretation: There is no privileged scale in the recursive toroidal encoding; refining or coarsening the sampling density corresponds to different depth encodings of the same torus, not to a change in geometry.
